_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Leadership and guidance involves providing effective leadership and management through team motivation, decision making, risk management, mediation and professional development.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.506), LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.509). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [decision, development, effective, guidance, involves, leadership] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.865, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Leadership and guidance involves providing effective leadership and management t" and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.516 ≈ STS 0.509 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [decision, development, effective, guidance, involves, leadership]. WIDAI terms: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].

signals.detail: STS 0.509 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
